title: review-dismissal
description: One append-only record in the per-repo review-dismissals store (docs/review/dismissals.jsonl). Records that a reviewer dismissed a finding so a later review can SHOW the prior dismissal — the store never auto-suppresses. actor is attribution, not authorization. fingerprint excludes the line number (stable across a reformat) and hashes the normalized snippet (distinguishes one rule firing twice in a file). schema_version lets a consumer (e.g. the multi-round review sweep) pin the format it reads.

schema_version.description: Format version of this record; a consumer asserts the version it understands (R7 — guards silent schema drift)

fingerprint.description: sha256(file + rule/title + sha256(normalized snippet))[:16]; NEVER includes a line number

verdict.description: Per-finding verdict; the store records dismissals but the enum is shared with the review verdict truth-table

reason.description: Why the finding was dismissed (shown verbatim when the finding recurs)

file.description: Canonical file path the finding pointed at

actor.description: resolve_actor() output: user:<u>[/agent:<a>] | ci. Attribution, not authentication

ts.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the dismissal was recorded

line.description: Display metadata only — the line the finding pointed at when recorded. NEVER part of the fingerprint

code_evidence.description: The snippet the finding pointed at; carried for display. May exceed PIPE_BUF, which is why the append is flock-guarded

rule_id.description: Optional rule id or title the finding came from
